description_long: This is an adult male with a muscular build, standing with arms slightly outstretched. His upper body is heavily tattooed with intricate red and black designs covering his chest, arms, and back. He is shirtless and wears loose, ankle-length pants that appear to be made of a lightweight fabric. His feet are bare, and he has a black glove or wrap on his right hand. The individual has a bald head and a stern facial expression, with a necklace visible around his neck. The overall appearance suggests a streetwise or martial arts-inspired character, suitable for urban environments.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male standing shirtless in loose pants, barefoot, with a black glove on one hand and a bald head.
description_view_0: Front view shows detailed chest tattoos, necklace, facial features, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm tattoos, and the black glove on the right hand.
description_view_2: Rear view displays extensive back tattoos, bare feet, and the loose fit of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the right arm's tattoos, glove, and the muscular build from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: loose ankle-length pants, single glove or wrap, necklace accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
